scenarios.name: Set up ESLint 9 flat config for a TypeScript React project
scenarios.rationale: Baseline defaults to legacy .eslintrc JSON format and fails the flat config rubric; treatment matches eslint.config.js array pattern with @eslint/js, typescript-eslint, and scoped files globs.

scenarios.name: Add ESLint as a blocking GitHub Actions check that fails on warnings
scenarios.rationale: Baseline produces a working workflow but typically omits --max-warnings 0; treatment uses the exact flag pattern from the skill to treat warnings as CI errors.
